## Fillings.IScaledFillingRecipeVersion.snapshotIngredients property

Optional snapshot of ingredients for archival. Only present when explicitly requested (e.g., before losing access to source).

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly snapshotIngredients?: ReadonlyArray<IIngredientSnapshot>;
```
